scripts.build: rm -rf dist && rolldown -c rolldown.config.js && cp example/index.html dist/ && cp -r example/public/* dist/
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently "rolldown -c rolldown.config.js -w" "chokidar 'example/index.html' 'example/public/**/*' -c 'cp example/index.html dist/ && cp -r example/public/* dist/'" "sirv dist --dev --port 3000 --host"
